report.summary: Community growth cycle Mar 17 evening: 405 pages live (+17 since last cycle, +71 this week); 8 new DeFi/blockchain guides published (Days 55-59); evening social drafts v12 created with 4 tweets (DeFi drop, Sui, cross-chain, Bitcoin LSTs) + Discord/Telegram update + newsletter insert for Thu; social card SVG created; FOMC T-2 narrative continues; publish queue down to 1 item.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet (Tue PM): 8 DeFi deep dives drop — cross-chain, DAO, Sui, BTC LSTs, Aerodrome, Karak, Fluid, portfolio rebalancing; 405 pages milestone; CTA to /learn
Tweet (Tue PM): Sui blockchain guide — 1M+ daily active accounts, Move language, parallel execution, zkLogin; CTA to /learn/sui-blockchain-guide-2026
Tweet (Tue PM): Cross-chain interoperability — bridge evolution from multisigs to ZK-proofs, intent-based bridging; CTA to /learn/cross-chain-interoperability-guide-2026
Tweet (Tue PM): Bitcoin liquid staking tokens — BTCFi $7B+ TVL, lstBTC, Babylon/Lombard; CTA to /learn/bitcoin-liquid-staking-tokens-guide-2026
Discord/Telegram (Tue PM): Daily build update — 8 guides listed with links, 405 pages status, FOMC reminder
Newsletter insert (Thu Mar 19): 4 featured guides (Sui, cross-chain, BTC LSTs, Aerodrome) + summary of remaining 4; 405 page milestone
Updated week-in-review tweet (Fri): 405 pages, 71 published in one week, queue at 1 item

sections.title: Analytics Context
items: 405 published pages — up from 388 at last community cycle (+17 pages). 71 new pages this week total.
PUBLISH_QUEUE: 1 item remaining (/learn/yield-bearing-stablecoins). Near-zero backlog maintained.
Day 55-59 content: cross-chain interop, DAO governance, Sui blockchain, portfolio rebalancing, Bitcoin LSTs, Aerodrome Finance, Karak Network, Fluid Protocol.
FOMC T-2 (Wed Mar 19). Social calendar continues with FOMC as central narrative through Thursday newsletter.
GSC organic signals: Day 17+ of 14-21 indexing window. First organic clicks arriving. 71 new pages this week entering the index — significant impressions jump expected.
